hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook claude SessionStart; else exec orca hook claude SessionStart; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook claude UserPromptSubmit; else exec orca hook claude UserPromptSubmit; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook claude PreToolUse; else exec orca hook claude PreToolUse; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook claude PermissionRequest; else exec orca hook claude PermissionRequest; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook claude PostToolUse; else exec orca hook claude PostToolUse; fi'
sh -c 'if command -v ryk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec ryk hook claude SessionEnd; else exec orca hook claude SessionEnd; fi'
